questionText: Disclose your organization's best available techniques as a percentage of total plant capacity.
questionKo: 공시 귀사의 best 사용 가능 techniques percentage 의 total plant capacity.
simpleHelp: The purpose of this question is to achieve a reasonable indication of the level of adoption of Best Available Techniques (BAT) in the sector. CDP recognizes that this should not be taken as a proxy for overall efficiency and productivity in an organization. Furthermore, the adoption of some technologies is dependent on various site or market conditions, which is why we provide the opportunity for explanation. Nonetheless, this information is useful in understanding the general landscape and adoption status of BAT in the organization and across the sector, and the reasons behind their limitations.

columns.text: Primary reason for not having technique
options: Other priorities are being met first
Considered infeasible due to site-specific conditions

guidance.text:
General 
Complete this table for each of the techniques/process in column 1.
Enter information for the reporting year.
If "Other" is selected, please elaborate in column 4.
% of total plant capacity (column 2) 
Using this numerical field enter the percentage of your total plant capacity that utilizes the technique/process listed in column 1, using a value between 0-100, and no more than 2 decimal places.
Primary reason for not having techniques (column 3) 
From the drop-downs presented, select the primary reason for not having the technique/process listed in column 1.
If you select "Other, please specify," provide a label for the Primary reason for not having technique.
For techniques that you use, select "Other, please specify" and enter "Not applicable". 
Comment (column 4) (optional) 
Using this text field, you may expand on the primary reason selected in column 3, or list further reasons.
You may wish to outline whether you have plans to implement the process/technique listed in column 1.
guidance.textKo: 일반 완료 이 table each 의 techniques/프로세스 열 1. Enter 정보 보고연도. 만약 "기타" 선택됨, please elaborate 열 4. % 의 total plant capacity (열 2) Using 이 숫자 입력 enter percentage 의 귀사의 total plant capacity utilizes technique/프로세스 listed 열 1, using 가치 between 0-100, 및 아니요 more than 2 decimal places. 주된 이유 아니요t having techniques (열 3) 에서 drop-downs presented, 선택 주된 이유 아니요t having technique/프로세스 listed 열 1. 만약 귀사 선택 "기타, 직접 입력," 제공 label 주된 이유 아니요t having technique. techniques 귀사 use, 선택 "기타, 직접 입력" 및 enter "해당 없음". 의견 (열 4) (선택지al) Using 이 텍스트 입력, 귀사 할 수 있습니다 expand 주된 이유 열에서 선택 3, 또는 list further 이유s. 귀사 할 수 있습니다 wish outline whether 귀사 have plans implement 프로세스/technique listed 열 1.

guidance.text: Further information on BAT for steel sector can be found in EIPPCB's "BAT Reference Document for Iron and Steel Production" and EPA's white paper on "Available and Emerging Technologies for Reducing Greenhouse Gas Emissions from the Iron and Steel Industry" .
guidance.textKo: Further 정보 BAT 철강 섹터 할 수 있습니다 found EIPPCB's "BAT Reference Document Iron 및 철강 Production" 및 EPA's white paper "사용 가능 및 Emerging Tech아니요logies Reducing 온실가스 배출량 에서 Iron 및 철강 Industry".

guidance.text: Best available technique (BAT): Best available techniques (BAT) refer to the available techniques which are the best for preventing or minimizing emissions and impacts on the environment. BAT include both the technology used, and the way your installation is designed, built, maintained, operated and decommissioned.
guidance.textKo: Best 사용 가능 technique (BAT): Best 사용 가능 techniques (BAT) refer 사용 가능 techniques best preventing 또는 minimizing 배출량 및 영향 environment. BAT include 모두 기술 used, 및 way 귀사의 inst모든ation designed, built, maintained, operated 및 decommissioned.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Figure greater than 0 in column '% of total plant capacity' in at least one row - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Figure of 0 provided in column '% of total plant capacity' AND column 'Primary reason...' complete in at least one row - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
